name: FN57 | 坠落危险
descriptionEn: Highly accurate and armor-piercing, the pricy Five-Seven is a slow-loader that compensates with a generous 20-round magazine and forgiving recoil. A multicolored custom paint job which reads \"FALL\" and \"CONSTRUCTION\" has been applied. Mind the gap
descriptionZh: 拥有极高的精准度，能穿透护甲，价格昂贵的 FN57 换弹时间较慢，作为补偿，它具有设计巧妙的 20 发子弹和较低的后坐力。 这把武器采用多色自定义涂装，上面写有“FALL”和“CONSTRUCTION”字样。 小心间隙
